name: Jean Pare's Granola Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Cream butter and sugars together well.
3. Beat in eggs one at a time. Add vanilla extract.
4. Mix remaining ingredients separately.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto a greased or parchment-lined cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 10-12 minutes.
Options:
Substitute the chocolate chips with an equal amount of chopped dark chocolate bars (such as "Burnt Almond") or cut into chunks.
Add candied cherries, sprinkles, etc.
